~/blog $ open agent-notes

Agent Notes

2026-07-01

tech/ai/agentwriting/notes

Nested tags can express broad and narrow topics at the same time.

For example, this post belongs to tech/ai/agent, so it also appears under tech and tech/ai.

:q to shell | Esc normal | i/a insert | j/k scroll | g/G top/bottom

~/blog/posts/agent-notes.md >
